name: Beaverkill Campground & Day Use Area (Roscoe)
notes: DEC campground at the Beaverkill covered bridge; day-use fee in season.

name: Upper Esopus Creek angler access (Five Arches Bridge, Boiceville)
notes: Wild-rainbow water; DEC-listed angler access on the upper Esopus.

name: West Branch Ausable River - Wilmington Wild Forest (Rt 86)
notes: Roadside pull-offs along Rt 86 through the Notch reach.

name: West Canada Creek PFR (Trenton Falls)
notes: Public fishing rights below Hinckley/Trenton Falls dams.

name: Ninemile Creek PFR (Marcellus)
notes: Stocked + wild browns; short drive from Syracuse.

name: Wiscoy Creek PFR parking (Rt 39, Bliss-Pike)
notes: 12.6 mi of PFR; premier wild brown trout stream (not stocked).
